summary: Project with a data table/form that includes columns for site photos, signatures, point of contact, and project manager names.

existing_features.title: In the PDF report table layout, add a SITE PHOTOS column positioned immediately before the SIGNATURE column. The column should display the uploaded site photo thumbnails (as embedded base64 images) in the generated PDF.

Add POINT OF CONTACT and PROJECT MANAGER name input fields to the ReportForm. These fields should capture text values, persist to localStorage alongside other form data, and be included in the generated PDF report.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add SITE PHOTOS column before the SIGNATURE column
Add POINT OF CONTACT and PROJECT MANAGER name fields
